name: Synchrona authenticated full website flow
description: Synchrona is a real-time collaborative event planner for multi-day event rooms. Authenticated users create secure UUID/slug rooms, invite others by link or room code, manage granular room permissions, inspect a live Command Center, build day-by-day timelines with activity blocks, attach democratic voting polls with more than five options, maintain private and public room to-do lists, write comments on timelines, activities, budgets, and to-dos, monitor budget caps and allocated costs, and use moderated room chat. Run the Supabase feature_permissions_todos_comments_patch.sql patch before this test.

planSteps.expected: The Synchrona sign-in form loads without a server error.

planSteps.description: Enter carlospeter582011@gmail.com in the email field and K@ko2011 in the password field, then submit the form.
planSteps.expected: Authentication succeeds and the browser lands on the dashboard.

planSteps.description: Verify the dashboard title 'My Event Rooms' and the 'New room' button are visible.
Create a new event room titled 'TestSprite Full Site Event' with description 'Automated full website verification' and a total budget cap of 1200.
planSteps.expected: The room is created and the browser navigates to the room workspace.

planSteps.description: Verify the room workspace renders the room title, secure slug, host role indicator, command tab, timeline tab, tasks tab, budget tab, chat tab, invite controls, and participant sidebar.
planSteps.expected: The room shell, Command Center entry point, and RBAC host controls are visible.

planSteps.description: Open the Command tab and verify readiness score, open polls metric, task progress metric, budget health metric, live verification board, and permission matrix are visible.
planSteps.expected: The Command Center summarizes room health and participant capabilities in testable UI regions.

planSteps.description: Verify the participant sidebar shows the Host User Controller with granular permission toggles including manage users, create polls, vote, use chat, moderate chat, manage comments, and create public to-dos.
planSteps.expected: The Host can grant or revoke exact room capabilities, not only broad Editor or Viewer roles.

planSteps.description: Open the invite popup, verify the invite link and room code fields are visible, then close it.
planSteps.expected: The room provides copy-link, copy-code, and share invite actions.

planSteps.description: On the timeline tab, add a day titled 'Arrival Day' with date 2026-08-10.
planSteps.expected: The new day appears in the timeline.

planSteps.description: Add an activity to Arrival Day titled 'Welcome Dinner' with description 'Team kickoff dinner', cost 250, location 'Main Hall', and status Proposed.
planSteps.expected: The activity appears under Arrival Day with the proposed status and cost.

planSteps.description: Create a voting poll for Welcome Dinner with more than five options by using the Add option control, then vote for one option.
planSteps.expected: The poll renders live vote counts or bars, accepts more than five options, and records the vote without a row-level-security error.

planSteps.description: Open the Tasks tab, create a private to-do titled 'Confirm catering', create a public to-do if the permission is enabled, mark a to-do complete, and add a to-do comment.
planSteps.expected: Private and public to-dos render with scope labels, checkboxes, progress updates, and comments.

planSteps.description: Open the Budget tab and add a budget comment.
planSteps.expected: The budget dashboard shows Total Budget Cap, Total Allocated, Confirmed, Remaining, a correctly filled usage bar, the Welcome Dinner cost breakdown, and budget comments.

planSteps.description: Open the Chat tab, send a short message saying 'TestSprite verification message', then delete the user's own message. If chat moderation is enabled, verify the clear chat action is available.
planSteps.expected: The chat panel accepts messages, supports own-message deletion, and exposes moderation controls only for users with permission.

planSteps.description: Verify no unhandled application error, 500 page, missing Supabase configuration warning, or blocked auth confirmation message is visible.
planSteps.expected: The authenticated full-site workflow completes without visible fatal errors.
